descriptions.text: A full colorization of Final Fantasy Adventure for Game Boy Color version. Also includes a new world map and many bug fixes.

The Hero, imprisoned by the Dark Lord of Glaive, escapes and discovers a plot to control the Mana Tree—an ancient source of life. Joined by the Heroine, a descendant of the Mana guardians, they seek allies to stop the evil sorcerer Julius. Through betrayal, sacrifice, and trials, the Hero obtains the legendary sword Excalibur and defeats Julius, saving the world. In the end, the Heroine becomes the new Mana Tree, and the Hero her eternal guardian.
